creator: gustavofukao@gmail.com
text:
On 9/11/06, FreeBSD-gnats-submit@freebsd.org
<FreeBSD-gnats-submit@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/103154'.
> The individual assigned to look at your
> report is: freebsd-ports-bugs.
>
> You can access the state of your problem report at any time
> via this link:
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=103154
>
> >Category:       ports
> >Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
> >Synopsis:       [NEW PORT] devel/gazpacho: GUI builder for the GTK+ toolkit
> >Arrival-Date:   Mon Sep 11 19:00:36 GMT 2006
>


--- gazpacho-0.6.6.shar begins here ---
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#       gazpacho
#       gazpacho/pkg-descr
#       gazpacho/Makefile
#       gazpacho/distinfo
#       gazpacho/pkg-plist
#       gazpacho/files
#       gazpacho/files/extrapatch-setup.py
#
echo c - gazpacho
mkdir -p gazpacho > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - gazpacho/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >gazpacho/pkg-descr << 'END-of-gazpacho/pkg-descr'
XGUI builder for the GTK+ toolkit designed to be ultra easy to use
X
XAuthor:        Lorenzo Gil Sanchez <lgs@sicem.biz>
XWWW:   http://gazpacho.sicem.biz/
END-of-gazpacho/pkg-descr
echo x - gazpacho/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >gazpacho/Makefile << 'END-of-gazpacho/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:   gazpacho
X# Date created:                2006-09-08
X# Whom:                        Gustavo Fukao <gustavofukao@gmail.com>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=      gazpacho
XPORTVERSION=   0.6.6
XCATEGORIES=    devel python
XMASTER_SITES=  http://ftp.acc.umu.se/pub/GNOME/sources/gazpacho/0.6/
X
XMAINTAINER=    gustavofukao@gmail.com
XCOMMENT=       GUI builder for the GTK+ toolkit
X
XRUN_DEPENDS=   ${LOCALBASE}/bin/kiwi-i18n:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/py-kiwi
X
XNO_BUILD=      yes
X
XUSE_GNOME=     pygtk2
XUSE_PYTHON=    yes
XUSE_PYDISTUTILS=       yes
XUSE_GETTEXT=   yes
X
X.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
X
X.if defined(NOPORTDOCS)
XEXTRA_PATCHES= ${FILESDIR}/extrapatch-setup.py
XPLIST_SUB+=    NODOCS="@comment "
X.else
XPLIST_SUB+=    NODOCS=""
X.endif
X
X.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
END-of-gazpacho/Makefile
echo x - gazpacho/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >gazpacho/distinfo << 'END-of-gazpacho/distinfo'
XMD5 (gazpacho-0.6.6.tar.gz) = 69c889cd4743ef53db06509c795597cf
XSHA256 (gazpacho-0.6.6.tar.gz) =
7dbbc3656608f91020913f85bb6424a310bd40924409e7c9dca0962da8a34dda
XSIZE (gazpacho-0.6.6.tar.gz) = 448335
END-of-gazpacho/distinfo
echo x - gazpacho/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >gazpacho/pkg-plist << 'END-of-gazpacho/pkg-plist'
